untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of '12 consecutive new highs' which cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. This pattern requires multi-bar lookback logic and a counter/sequence detector not available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, 'price moves in a trading range' requires range detection across multiple bars. The allowed indicators do not support sequential pattern counting or explicit consecutive bar comparisons beyond prev_* references.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using trend confirmation (close > sma_20) and new high detection (high > prev_high) as proxies, but this does not capture the specific '12 consecutive' requirement. A custom pattern detector would be needed for proper implementation. Exit condition inferred as retracement below prior close when pattern fails (61% continuation rate implies 39% failure rate).
